docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,983.01 FILED BY ZIMMERMAN, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT WAKAMATSU, KATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED DEC-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WAKAMATSU, KATHERINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIMMERMAN, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAKAMATSU, KATHERINE $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WAKAMATSU, KATHERINE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
